import { jsx, Fragment } from "react/jsx-runtime"; import { createElement } from "react"; import { Asset } from "./Asset.js"; import { useRouter } from "./useRouter.js"; import { useTags } from "./headContentUtils.js"; function HeadContent() { const tags = useTags(); const router = useRouter(); const nonce = router.options.ssr?.nonce; return /* @__PURE__ */ jsx(Fragment, { children: tags.map((tag) => /* @__PURE__ */ createElement(Asset, { ...tag, key: `tsr-meta-${JSON.stringify(tag)}`, nonce })) }); } export { HeadContent }; //# sourceMappingURL=HeadContent.js.map
